_comment: Example product-specific overrides. Pass via: node scripts/vpat/generate-vpat.mjs --overrides scripts/vpat/overrides-example.json

product.name: Kendo UI for Angular
product.description: Kendo UI for Angular is a library of 110+ fully native components for building high-quality modern Angular UI.

knownExceptions.explanation: Product-specific: Some color themes using solid/flat fill modes do not achieve the minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for text. Use the Default Ocean Blue A11y swatch for full AA contrast compliance.

additionalProductNotes.Angular-Specific Notes: Kendo UI for Angular components leverage Angular's change detection and zone.js. ARIA attributes are managed reactively and update automatically when component state changes. No manual attribute management is required.
additionalProductNotes.Upgrade Guidance: When upgrading between major versions, review the accessibility changelog for any changes to ARIA patterns or keyboard navigation behavior.
